expected_condition: scenario plan rows match expected rows
numeric network KPI columns contain no missing values
required numeric sector columns contain no missing values; NaN is allowed for undefined per-sector means/medians
notes: Undefined means/medians are expected when a sector has no attached or active UEs.

expected_condition: each scenario has configured number of realizations
heavy_overload is not part of Phase 4 scenario set
mean low_load load < mean normal load
mean normal QoS > mean overload QoS
mean overload overloaded sector count > normal
mean handover_stress risk > mean normal risk
ES candidate scenario has at least one candidate sector on average
mean outage attach rate <= mean normal attach rate
